'''Clantaano III''', also known as '''Clantaano''', was a [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Albanin sector/Legends|Albanin sector]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the nomadic and violent [[Clantaani]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The Clantaani [[Gunslinger/Legends|gunman]] [[Longo Two-Guns]] and his cousins were [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on Clantaano III, and they gave rise to a [[Longo Two-Guns Gang|gang]] of Clantaani criminals that moved offworld by [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

==Description==
Clantaano III, also referred to simply as Clantaano, was a dry and dusty [[Desert/Legends|desert]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. It occupied the third [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position in the [[Clantaano system/Legends|Clantaano system]],<ref name="BH" /> a part of the [[Albanin sector/Legends|Albanin sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> within [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]] known as the [[Triellus Trade Route/Legends|Triellus Trade Route]] connected the planet to the [[Teth system/Legends|Teth]] and [[Barab system/Legends|Barab systems]].<ref name="TEA" /> Clantaano III had meager natural resources.<ref name="BH" />

==History==
[[File:LongoDosPistolas.jpg|thumb|right|220px|Clantaani, such as Longo Two-Guns, were native to Clantaano III.]]
In the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] preceding the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|222|Klintee, 'Deadeye'}}</ref> of [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the [[Clantaani]] cousins [[Longo Two-Guns]] and [[Klintee|"Deadeye" Klintee]] established themselves as formidable [[Gunslinger/Legends|gunmen]] on their [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] Clantaano III. Along with their cousin [[Radd Hardwikk]], the pair eventually organized a [[Longo Two-Guns Gang|gang]] of Clantaani criminals, including<ref name="Uncivilized">{{SW|url=news/so-uncivilized-great-gunslingers-in-star-wars-part-1|series=So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars|text=Part 1|nolive=1}}</ref> the Clantaano-[[Reproduction/Legends|born]]<ref name="BH" /> [[Cahoon|"Black Eye" Cahoon]] and [[Rengo|"Dusty" Rengo]], as well as [[Clem Vaneer|Clem "Trigger" Vaneer]] and the<ref name="Uncivilized" /> offworlder<ref name="BH" /> [[Wint|"Wrong Way" Wint]].<ref name="Uncivilized" /> At some point by 32 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]],<ref name="Date">{{SW|url=news/so-uncivilized-great-gunslingers-in-star-wars-part-1|series=So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars|text=Part 1|nolive=1}} establishes that [[Longo Two-Guns]] and his [[Longo Two-Guns Gang|gang]] had left Clantaano III for [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] by the [[Time/Legends|time]] the events of ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' took place. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the latter to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]; therefore, Two-Guns and his gang must have left Clantaano III by that date.</ref> Longo Two-Guns and his gang moved their operations off Clantaano III.<ref name="Uncivilized" />

==Inhabitants==
Clantaano III was the homeworld of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] Clantaani [[Species/Legends|species]]. The Clantaani organized themselves into several marauding nomadic tribes that were engaged in constant conflict with each other over their home planet's resources.<ref name="BH" />

==Behind the scenes==
Clantaano III was first mentioned in [[Prima Games]]' [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|official strategy guide]] for the [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]]
''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'', which was written by [[David Hodgson]]. The guide on one occasion misspelled the planet's name as "Clantaani III."<ref name="BH" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', written by [[Daniel Wallace]] and [[Jason Fry]], placed the Clantaano [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Clantaano III, within grid square U-12.<ref name="TEA" />
